fo.resourcePack.modmenuhelper: §7Lists mods' main features and options in Mod Menu§r

accessibility.onboarding.screen.title:
Welcome to §7Fabulously Optimized§r! Here are some tips.

§f🪟§r Connected Textures and Dynamic Lights - configure in §7Mods§r
§a🏞§r Better Grass and full screen with Alt+Tab - enable in §7Video Settings§r
§e✨§r Shaders and fancy resource packs - just §7add and enable§r
§5🎮§r Game controllers supported - simply §7connect and use§r
§3🛜§r Play with friends, anywhere - press §7Open to Internet§r in singleplayer
§8📸§r Take 4K screenshots - press §7F9§r
§6🏴§r Free custom capes - §7https://download.fo/cape§r
§b🌐§r Help translate the modpack - §7https://download.fo/translate§r
§2➕§r Add extra mods - §7https://download.fo/add§r
§4❓§r Problems or questions - §7https://download.fo/wiki§r

(§7Maximize window§r or visit §7https://download.fo/tutorial§r)
